calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Sep-11-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: May Tong for Sandra Lam (Trustee).

The Court noted that this petition is relying on the escrow instructions and asked Counsel what other authority she has. Ms. Tam stated that Probate Code 15200 says all that is required is a declaration by the owner of property that the owner holds the property as trustee, made reference to Probate Code 15206, stated that she has no other authority and provided a revised proposed order. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
